title: Property Consultant - Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates:
Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panchshil Realty Asia Pacific Associates!
